en.name: Level 40 — Roller Rockin' Pizza!
en.shortDescription: A retro 1980s arcade of playable machines, vending sauce best left alone, and unseen entities that quietly use the games.
en.atmosphere: Neon-lit arcade humming with machines and chatter, thick with the smell of decades-old pizza and stale soda.
en.tips: Don't play the anomalous games — especially 'General Starflare: Wild Space'. Never drink the glowing Universal Sauce. Pat at the desk is safe.
